title: Repeat With a Loop

contentBlocks.text: A for loop repeats code a set number of times. range(5) counts 0, 1, 2, 3, 4 — five numbers, starting at 0.

contentBlocks.code:
for i in range(3):
    print("Coding is fun!")

contentBlocks.text: Write a loop that prints the word "Blast off in " followed by the countdown number, counting from 5 down would be tricky — instead, just print the numbers 0 through 4 using range(5), one per line.

starterCode: # Print the numbers 0 through 4, one per line

testCases.failureMessage: Expected the numbers 0, 1, 2, 3, 4 printed one per line.

hints: Use for i in range(5): to loop 5 times.
Indent print(i) underneath the for line.
